title: CIFAR-10 Image Classification
description: Built and trained a convolutional neural network using Python and PyTorch to classify CIFAR-10 images into 10 categories. Implemented preprocessing, batch training, evaluation, and data augmentation techniques.

title: Women In Computing @UCSD Website
description: Collaborated on an informational website about UCSD colleges, including GE requirements, housing options, and dining halls. Built interactive features using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

title: Image & Audio Processing Toolkit
description: Developed an object-oriented image and audio processing toolkit using Python, NumPy, and PIL. Supported grayscale conversion, rotation, brightness adjustment, audio reversal, clipping, and speed changes.

title: Spotify Song Analysis & Recommendation System
description: Analyzed Spotify song metadata and lyrics using Python, Pandas, and Matplotlib. Built a recommendation tool that identifies Taylor Swift songs with similar features to popular Spotify tracks.

title: Expository Visualization: Grocery Store Foods
description: Designed a static expository visualization showing that ultra-processed foods are cheaper per 100 calories in many broad food categories. Cleaned and transformed GroceryDB data to compare median cost differences.
